caption: A man wearing a black t-shirt and a black baseball cap with a logo on the front sits in front of a grey microphone. He is wearing a gold chain around his neck and gold bracelets on both wrists. In the background, a white wall features several black stars and the words "HUSTLE" and "BOSS" in large red letters. On-screen graphics include logos that read "BOSS TALK 101" and "PODCAST". Throughout the sequence, the man is speaking while gesturing with both hands. He begins with both hands raised, palms facing forward; then, his left hand lowers slightly while his right hand remains raised with fingers spread. As the sequence progresses, he continues to talk and gesture with his right hand, while his left arm remains lowered. The text "CHECK IT" is visible on his shirt, though partially obscured by the microphone.
